creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
PNP4Nagios 0.4.14 is there already for some time and I had just updated
the port to this shiny new version.

And there is one neat in the previous commit to net-mgmt/pnp: miwi@
substituted PREFIX with LOCALBASE in the configure flags.  Martin, this
seems to be wrong, so PREFIX should be returned.

Fix: The first fix that brings PREFIX back:
And the port update itself:


--- update-to-0.4.14.diff ends here ---

The updated port was tested on my installation; it also passes builds
on my Tinderbox for 6.x, 7.x and 8.x.--1G9HyNJO9rUcRLfnkwhzHuOqweOTTzP4QxdpMWKVQlFhb3Tp
Content-Type: text/plain; name="0.4.12-revert-LOCALBASE.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
